model_contract.description: Cross-agent model resilience contract — each agent uses the other's fallback as its default. Updated 2026-05-11 with DeepSeek V4.

apex.rationale: APEX uses MiniMax-M2.7 for fast constitutional triage. Falls back to DeepSeek V4 Pro for deep reasoning deliberation. Kimi K2.6 as emergency fallback.

openclaw.rationale: OpenClaw uses MiniMax-M2.7 for responsive Telegram/Discord. Falls back to DeepSeek V4 Pro for complex reasoning. Kimi K2.6 as coding-specialized emergency fallback.

deliberation.notes: APEX uses deterministic F1-F13 floor regex evaluation. Stateless oracle — mechanical application of constitution only. DeepSeek V4 Pro configured for high-confidence deliberation.
